headline: Risk-on holds: HON spin-off reshapes aero/industrial comps; space names still ripping; 4 desk takes live.

watch.line: HON aero spin-off forces sell-side to re-mark pure-play aero multiples — GE Aerospace direct beneficiary. High conf.
